items.title: Contrasting patterns of alpine biodiversity across mountains and taxa worldwide
items.desc: This study compares alpine biodiversity patterns for plants and vertebrates across mountains worldwide using an expert-validated dataset. Authors found strong variation among mountains and taxonomic groups, likely driven by biogeographic history.
